message:
feat(doctor): add health check infrastructure for xf doctor command

Implements comprehensive health check system for the upcoming xf doctor command:

Archive validation (xf-11.4.1):
- check_required_files: Validates expected archive files are present
- check_json_structure: Parses and validates JS-wrapped JSON files
- check_duplicate_ids: Detects duplicate tweet IDs in archive
- check_timestamp_consistency: Flags impossible dates (future/pre-2006)
- validate_archive: Runs all archive checks

SQLite health checks (xf-11.4.3):
- database_health_checks: Master check runner
- check_integrity: PRAGMA integrity_check
- check_schema_version: Validates schema version
- check_fts_integrity: FTS5 integrity-check for all tables
- check_fts_orphaned/missing: Detects orphaned/missing FTS entries
- check_orphaned_dm_messages: Finds orphaned DM records
- database_table_stats: Reports row counts and sizes

Tantivy index health checks (xf-11.4.2):
- index_health_checks: Master check runner
- check_index_directory: Validates index path and meta.json
- check_index_version: Verifies Tantivy version compatibility
- check_segment_count: Reports segment health (warns if >10)
- check_document_count: Compares index vs database counts
- check_sample_query: Times a test query
- check_index_size: Reports index size on disk

Also adds:
- repl.rs: REPL infrastructure for future interactive mode
- rustyline dependency for readline support

Closes xf-11.4.1, xf-11.4.2, xf-11.4.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
